title: Drill instructor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|drill instructor|[[Drill sergeant/Legends|drill sergeant]]}}
[[File:Drill_Instructor_LBE.png|thumb|right|250px|An Alliance drill instructor]]
A '''drill instructor''' was a non-commissioned [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the armed forces who was assigned the duty of initiating new recruits entering the military into the customs and practices of military life.

[[Thaffe]] was a drill instructor.

{{Military-stub}}

==Appearances==
